subcodes.first_line: Whosoever transcendeth that which he possesseth and turneth his gaze unto that which is with God - that is, becometh not the plaything of idle fancies and vain imaginings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هر نفسی از ما عنده بگذرد و به ما عند الله ناظر باشد یعنی ملعب ظنون و اوهام خود واقع نشود
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @praise and encouragement, @power of prayer, @eulogies; reminiscences, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @the power of example
